{{CargoRelic
|name=Kapa's Camera
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=12-05
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Dec 5, 1953, Photographer Kapa carried this camera and did interviews in Vietnam.

Kapa took many photos with this camera, some of which made history in the journalism field. In the following year, he died after accidentally stepping on a landmine. Kapa reported 5 major wars of the 20th century with photos taken by this camera. His photos remain masterpieces in the journalism field today.

[Kapa's Camera]

Famous photos: The Normandy Landing and The Falling Soldier
|fame=55
|art=37
|fth=46
|civ=72
|tech=33
|ss1=Time Machine Max Cap +6%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +6%
|ss2=Time Machine Max Cap +8%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +8%
|ss3=Time Machine Max Cap +10%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +10%
|ss4=Time Machine Max Cap +14%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +14%
|ss5=Time Machine Max Cap +18%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +18%
|ss7=Time Machine Max Cap +18%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +18%<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +14% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: Snail HP +300
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]] Place in Exploration Compass: Snail RUSH +30
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:CIV Relics]]
[[Category:Purple CIV Relics]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
